hero.title: Hi, I'm Sumin GC
hero.subtitle: I build modern, responsive static websites with polished visuals, fast performance, and a clean user experience.

description: I am Sumin GC, a passionate developer focused on crafting polished, accessible, and visually rich static portfolio experiences.
I enjoy turning structured data into dynamic front-end content with elegant CSS and smooth animations.
about.highlight: Expertise: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive design, UI animation, content-driven static pages.

skills.name: Responsive Layouts
skills.description: Design adaptive user interfaces that look great on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

skills.name: Visual Design
skills.description: Create polished, modern visuals with gradients, glassmorphism, and subtle motion.

skills.name: JavaScript Interaction
skills.description: Build dynamic content driven by JSON, with clean DOM rendering and performance-aware behavior.

skills.name: Static Site Development
skills.description: Develop lightweight, fast-loading static portfolio pages ready for hosting anywhere.

projects.title: Portfolio Landing Page
projects.summary: A modern professionally styled portfolio landing page with animated sections and responsive layout.

projects.title: Interactive Skills Showcase

projects.title: Contact Focus Section
